Residential Stucco in Williamson County, TX

Williamson County is one of the fastest-growing regions in Texas, and new homes here deserve an exterior finish that can keep up with the pace. Star Stucco of Austin installs long-lasting residential stucco systems across Round Rock, Cedar Park, Georgetown, and the rapidly expanding communities in between.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Built for Williamson County's Booming Neighborhoods

From the master-planned communities of Leander to the historic town squares of Georgetown, Williamson County offers a wide range of architectural styles. Builders and homeowners across the county are choosing stucco for its durability, low maintenance, and ability to complement both modern and traditional home designs.

The limestone and clay substrates common across Williamson County affect how structures settle over time. Combined with Central Texas temperature swings — from freezing nights in January to 105-degree afternoons in August — exterior finishes face constant stress. Our stucco systems are engineered to flex with these conditions rather than fight them.

Star Stucco of Austin has completed residential projects throughout Williamson County, from custom lakefront homes on Lake Georgetown to production-home developments along the I-35 corridor. We understand the local building environment and the standards homeowners here expect.

What's Included With Our Residential Stucco in Williamson County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Pre-Construction Assessment

We inspect the home's framing, sheathing, and weather barriers to verify everything is ready for stucco and catch any deficiencies before they become buried problems.

Moisture Management Layer

A code-compliant weather-resistive barrier and weep screed system is installed to channel any moisture that reaches the sheathing safely out of the wall assembly.

Metal Lath & Scratch Coat

Self-furred metal lath is fastened to the substrate, then a scratch coat is applied and keyed to create a solid base for the next layer.

Brown Coat Leveling

The brown coat builds the stucco to the correct thickness and provides a flat, plumb surface. We use straightedges and darbies to ensure uniformity across large wall areas.

Finish Texture Application

Our finishers apply your selected texture — smooth trowel, Santa Barbara, knockdown, or others — with consistent pressure and timing for a uniform result.

Cleanup & Warranty Review

The job site is cleaned thoroughly, and we review your warranty coverage and maintenance tips during a final walkthrough.

Common Residential Stucco Needs in Williamson County

Homeowners across Williamson County rely on us for residential stucco projects of every size, from small accent walls to full-home installations.

New Home Stucco Installation

With thousands of new homes going up each year in Round Rock, Leander, and Liberty Hill, builders need stucco crews who deliver quality finishes on tight construction timelines.

Full Exterior Re-Stucco

Homes built in the early 2000s boom across Williamson County are now reaching the age where a complete re-stucco restores curb appeal and seals out weather.

Addition & Garage Matching

Expanding your home means blending new stucco into existing walls. We carefully match color, aggregate, and finish texture so the addition looks original.

Foundation Movement Solutions

Williamson County sits on a mix of limestone and expansive clay that shifts with seasonal moisture. We use flexible basecoats and strategic control joints to absorb movement and prevent cracking.

Pre-Sale Exterior Refresh

Fresh stucco makes a strong first impression in Williamson County's competitive housing market, helping homes sell faster and at higher prices.

Why Choose Us for Residential Stucco in Williamson County?

  • Experienced in the high-volume building environment of Williamson County
  • Flexible stucco systems that handle limestone and clay substrate movement
  • Straightforward inspections — we document findings with photos so you see what we see
  • Respectful crews who keep job sites orderly in tight subdivision settings
  • UV-stable finishes that resist fading under intense Central Texas sun
  • Free detailed estimates delivered promptly so your project stays on schedule

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Williamson County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Residential Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Request Your Estimate

Contact us at (512) 706-9699 or through our website. We will schedule a visit to your Williamson County property at a time that works for you.

2

On-Site Evaluation

We assess the home's exterior, take measurements, discuss your finish and color preferences, and identify any substrate concerns.

3

Scope & Pricing Review

You receive a written proposal with materials, labor, timeline, and warranty information — straightforward and easy to compare.

4

Expert Installation

Our team completes the stucco work efficiently, keeping you updated on progress and performing a detailed walkthrough at completion.
